criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user rating of the app on app stores

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded

criteria.name: AI Capabilities
criteria.description: Extent and sophistication of AI features within the app

criteria.description: Metrics indicating how actively users interact with the app

criteria.name: Innovation
